reasoning: The control 7.2.2 primarily focuses on ensuring that resources are not publicly accessible unless explicitly required. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that network policies are in place to deny ingress and egress traffic by default, thereby preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, services should not use NodePort, which exposes them to the public internet, and Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to secure data in transit.
title: Requirement 7.2.2
